prompt: Order these geological events from earliest to latest

events.title: First nationwide geological map
events.fact: 1815 — William Smith maps geological strata of England

events.title: Mid-Atlantic Ridge mapped
events.fact: 1953 — Marie Tharp discovers massive rift valley

events.title: Seafloor spreading proposed
events.fact: 1960 — Harry Hess details plate tectonics mechanism

events.title: Alvarez asteroid hypothesis
events.fact: 1980 — proposes impact killed dinosaurs at K-Pg boundary
